{ "pwdHash": null, "profile": { "name": "Cristobal Rubio", "url": "crubiosec.dev/cv", "title": "Cybersecurity Analyst · SOC · Network Security", "years": "15+", "bioEs": "Ingeniero con más de 15 años "Engineer with 15+ years of international experience in technical management and compliance, now specialised in cybersecurity — Blue Team, SIEM, hardening, networking, IAM and incident response.",
